sglang.title: [CI]] Tee server logs to both file and stdout/stderr using PIPE
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
When return_stdout_stderr was added to popen_launch_server for CI testing,
the server’s stdout/stderr were redirected only to files. As a result, error logs
did not appear in the CI shell output, making debugging harder.
This change switches to using subprocess.PIPE and a tee mechanism so that logs

sglang.title: fix: radix cache memory accounting
sglang.author: skyzh
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

There seems to be two bugs in the radix cache:

In the case of page_size != 1 we might get key == 0 after truncating the key; in that case, we should return an empty match in advance
self.evictable_size_ when adding/removing the leaf should both use value instead of key

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Conditionally register cutlass_fp4_group_mm to fix building on Hopper
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
cutlass_fp4_group_mm was unconditionally registered in torch_bindings.cpp even though its implementation is only compiled when ENABLE_NVFP4_SM100 is defined, causing undefined symbol errors on Hopper.
This fix moves the ops.impl registration to be conditionally compiled within nvfp4_blockwis

vllm.title: `FusedMoE` support for the Transformers backend
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
MoE models do already work with the Transformers backend, but the performance is not ideal because FusedMoE is not used. This means that each expert gets a dedicated linear layer which is executed in a for loop on the Transformers side.
Depends on

 huggingface/transformers#40132 - so that FusedMoE.
